data.description: Actuate Therapeutics progresses Ewing Sarcoma clinical program following successful Phase 1 trial with complete and partial responses in pediatric sarcomas.

data.title: LibertyStream's successful field trial of DLE unit in Bakken region with $2.5 million in funding.
data.description: LibertyStream Infrastructure Partners Inc. has announced a successful field trial of its mobile Direct Lithium Extraction unit in North Dakota's Bakken region. The trial, conducted in collaboration with Wellspring Hydro, received a total of US$2.5 million in funding. LibertyStream is listed on the TSXV as LIB, OTCQB as VLTLF, and FSE as I2D. The trial marks a significant milestone in the Company's efforts to extract critical minerals, showcasing the effectiveness of their innovative technology.

data.title: Novartis reports Q2 earnings, $14.05 billion sales, raises forecast, and initiates $10 billion stock buyback. Sales growth driven by key drugs.
data.description: Pharmaceutical company Novartis AG (NYSE: NVS) announced their second-quarter 2025 earnings, with quarterly sales hitting $14.05 billion, just shy of the expected $14.06 billion. Net sales saw a 12% increase year over year (+11% on constant currency), while core operating income rose by 20% to $5.93 billion (+21% on constant currency). Key drivers of sales growth included breast cancer treatment Kisqali ($1.18 billion, +64% cc), Entresto ($2.36 billion, +22% cc), multiple sclerosis drug Kesimpta ($1.08 billion, +33% cc), Scemblix ($298 million, +79% cc), Leqvio ($298 million, +61% cc), and Pluvicto ($454 million, +30% cc). Adjusted earnings per share stood at $2.42, surpassing market expectations. Novartis also raised its full-year earnings forecast following these positive results.

data.title: CardVault by Tom Brady opens in Chicago near Wrigley Field, offering sports cards, memorabilia. Boston, July 17, 2025.
data.description: A new retail store near Wrigley Field will showcase a vast assortment of single cards, sealed boxes, authentic memorabilia, and exclusive Chicago-themed merchandise. Set to open on July 17, 2025, CardVault by Tom Brady aims to become the go-to spot for sports card enthusiasts. This store will offer an expansive collection of items for sale, including rare cards, limited edition boxes, and unique Chicago souvenirs. Owned by an undisclosed entity, the store's location positions it as a convenient stop for both locals and tourists attending events at Wrigley Field. Stay tuned for the grand opening to explore the diverse selection of items available at CardVault by Tom Brady.

data.title: YA sports novella "The Ump" reveals power of authority and self-discovery in high school softball; released by Values of America Publishing.
data.description: In Philadelphia on July 17, 2025, a new book will take readers on a humorous and enlightening exploration of high school softball. The story follows a reserved family attorney who learns the profound impact of wearing an umpire's uniform. Values of America Publishing is thrilled to introduce this unique narrative to the public.

data.title: TheraLight offers Extended Warranty Program for all models, providing more coverage and peace of mind.
data.description: A new Extended Care Program, launched by TheraLight, LLC in Lindon, Utah on July 17, 2025, offers additional coverage and peace of mind protection for customers. TheraLight, a leading provider of full-body photobiomodulation systems, introduced this program to provide enhanced warranty services. This initiative aims to give customers added reassurance and support for their products. This new program reflects the company's commitment to customer satisfaction and product reliability.

data.title: Zenarate named 2025 Top AI Learning & Performance Platform for the 2nd year by Training Industry, based in Palo Alto.
data.description: For the second consecutive year, Zenarate has been granted the prestigious AI in Training award by Training Industry for its excellence in offering AI training and performance solutions. Based in Palo Alto, California, the company received this recognition on July 17, 2025. Zenarate is proud to have stood out as a top provider in AI Coaching and Learner development, showcasing their expertise in the field.

data.title: SANY Group launches "No More Waiting" ethos for faster support worldwide, elevating customer service globally.
data.description: In the bustling city of Shanghai on July 17, 2025, SANY Group, renowned for its expertise in construction machinery, introduced its new worldwide service philosophy, "No More Waiting." This initiative showcases SANY's dedication to providing swift and top-notch assistance to its customers on a global scale. The "No More Waiting" principle is derived from SANY's firm belief in...

data.title: Jay Chou joins Douyin as "Mr. Chou", boosting shares of related companies in Hong Kong.
data.description: In Xiamen, China on July 9, 2025, Jay Chou made a public debut on Douyin as "周同学" (Mr. Chou), declaring his profession as a singer. This event led to a notable increase in the stock prices of Jay Chou-related businesses in Hong Kong.

data.title: INNOVATE begins refinancing transactions with $48.7M in convertible notes exchanges, $330M in senior secured notes.
data.description: Privately negotiated exchanges totaling $48.7 million in convertible notes were completed. There was also an exchange offer of $330 million for senior secured notes, along with the solicitation of consents. Additionally, agreements in principle were reached to extend the revolving credit agreement, amend and extend the CGIC note, extend the Spectrum notes, and amend and extend the R2 Technologies note.

data.title: B2B companies using Epicor P21 integration experts in Austin are speeding up cash flow by rethinking AR processes.
data.description: In Austin, Texas on July 17, 2025, the Driven by DCKAP Podcast showcased interviews with Epicor P21 integration specialists discussing methods to accelerate cash flow in B2B companies. Despite utilizing modern ERP systems, many businesses struggle with outdated processes involving paper checks, manual reconciliation, and slow payment cycles. This podcast explores strategies to expedite payments and streamline financial processes to maximize efficiency in B2B transactions.

data.title: Fridays nominated for Global Awards for innovative weight loss campaign in Dallas. July 17, 2025: Fridays recognized at World Out of Home Organization’s prestigious Global Awards.
data.description: The Dallas skyline recently showcased a groundbreaking advertisement for GLP-1 from Fridays, a leading wellness company known for revolutionizing modern weight loss solutions. The company, headquartered in IRVINE, Calif., has gained widespread acclaim, being nominated for the prestigious Global Awards by the World Out of Home Organization. This acknowledgment highlights the company's innovative approach to weight loss and signifies its global influence in the industry. The nomination showcases Fridays' commitment to advancing health and wellness on a large scale.

data.title: DCN Dx showcasing at ADLM 2025 in Chicago on July 29-31. Specializes in lateral flow diagnostics.
data.description: Come see DCN Dx at Booth number 2055 from July 29 to July 31 at McCormick Place in CARLSBAD, California. DCN Dx specializes in developing and manufacturing lateral flow diagnostics, as well as offering IVD regulatory consulting and clinical research services. They will be participating in ADLM 2025.

data.title: JYM Supplement Science, founded by Jim Stoppani, PhD, celebrates 12 years with over 1 million units sold. Launches limited-edition flavors and 20% off sale.
data.description: Renowned exercise physiologist Jim Stoppani, PhD, has introduced limited-edition flavors and a 20% off sitewide discount for JYM Supplement Science. The brand, known for its evidence-based products, has sold over 1 million units. The special promotion is valid from July 17 to 31, in Los Angeles.

data.title: Peabody to announce Q2 2025 results on July 31, 2025 with a conference call at 10 a.m. CT.
data.description: St. Louis-based Peabody (NYSE: BTU) is set to release its Q2 results on July 31, 2025. A conference call featuring management is planned for 10 a.m. CT on the same day to discuss the outcomes. Interested participants can join the call by following the provided instructions.
